case_title: CHUN MEI TAN VS. JOSE YEE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,750.00 FILED BY TAN, CHUN MEI AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-15-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, CHUN MEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YEE, JOSE $470.00 PRINCIPAL, $119.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $589.50, THE JUDGMENT RELECTS AN ADJUSTMENT FOR OFFSETS CLAIMED BY THE DEFENDANT. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
